# Wand

aria-label="Wand preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Wand icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" ## Tags
magic, selection

## Categories
design, gaming, cursors, photography

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/wand)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Wand;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Wand { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
